creator: vangyzen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since I have a commit bit now, I should take responsibility for the commit.

Garrett and Conrad:  Do you have a working Tahi test rig?  I have the pieces of one, but I haven't used it for a while, so it has probably bitrotted.  If you don't have one, I'll try to resurrect mine and run the Neighbor Discovery section [at least] on head.
